## Summary

What does this change and why?

## How verified

Tests run / manual checks performed.

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass for affected services
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` (`Unreleased`) updated if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets, real evidence, or PII included
- [ ] `THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md` updated if a bundled/downloaded component changed
